title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.064 - Firearms or ammunition, limitation on sales tax levied
text:
144.064.  Firearms or ammunition, limitation on sales tax levied. — No sales tax levied under this chapter on any firearms or ammunition shall be levied at a rate that is higher than the sales tax levied under this chapter or any other excise tax levied on any sporting goods or equipment or any hunting equipment.
(L. 2011 H.B. 294, et al.)
